summary: Iteration 33: Comprehensive testing of NewSidebar.jsx integration, agency 404 fix, and route simplification. All features working as expected. Agency login now lands on /app (not /app/partners). Sidebar shows only core menu items (Dashboard, Rezervasyonlar, Müşteriler, Finans, Raporlar). Expansion/Enterprise items hidden from visible navigation. Backend agency endpoints all return 200.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - minor cosmetic issue in recharts library, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/agency/bookings - 200 OK with list of bookings
Agency sidebar HIDES Tenant yönetimi - PASS
Agency sidebar account links (Faturalama, Ayarlar) - PASS
Admin sidebar shows only core menu - PASS
Admin sidebar HIDES expansion/enterprise items - PASS
Admin dashboard loads without crash - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: NewSidebar.jsx correctly filters navigation items by scope and mode
SUCCESS: appNavigation.js correctly defines showInSidebar=false for EXPANSION and ENTERPRISE groups
SUCCESS: redirectByRole.js correctly returns /app for agency_admin and agency_agent roles
SUCCESS: App.js route definitions correctly handle /app/agency/bookings and /app/agency/settlements
SUCCESS: router_registry.py correctly includes agency_settlements_router and agency_booking_router
SUCCESS: BookingDetailDrawer.jsx TDZ crash fix verified (loadEvents defined before usage)
NOTE: Minor recharts console warnings on admin dashboard - cosmetic only
context_for_next_testing_agent: NewSidebar.jsx integration complete. Agency and admin sidebars now show only core menu (Dashboard, Rezervasyonlar, Müşteriler, Finans, Raporlar). Expansion/Enterprise items are hidden via showInSidebar=false in appNavigation.js. Agency login redirects to /app (not /app/partners). All agency routes (/app/agency/bookings, /app/agency/settlements) working without crashes. BookingDetailDrawer TDZ fix verified working.

feature_validation_summary.Enterprise items hidden: PASS - Tenant yönetimi not in sidebar

verified_requirements: Agency login sonrası varsayılan iniş noktası /app - VERIFIED
Sidebar sadece core menü göstermeli - VERIFIED
